exemplar.title: How can we reconcile the relentless drive to pursue knowledge with the finite resources we have available? Discuss with reference to the natural sciences and one other area of knowledge.

detailedExemplarData.title: How can we reconcile the relentless drive to pursue knowledge with the finite resources we have available? Discuss with reference to the natural sciences and one other area of knowledge.

strengths: The essay maintains a clear and sustained focus on the prescribed title, effectively linking it to two Areas of Knowledge (Natural Sciences and History).
Relevant, concrete examples (CADD/Paxlovid development; Holocaust research) are accurately described and explicitly applied to the title question.
Awareness of alternative perspectives is demonstrated through acknowledgment of equity issues, evidence bias, and resource limitations.
Structural signposting (clear headings for examples, generalization, and conclusion) enhances reader navigation and coherence.
The conclusion succinctly restates central arguments, providing a sense of closure and reaffirming the essayâs central inquiry.
weaknesses: Depth of analysis is uneven: key concepts (e.g., modelling, interdisciplinarity, ethical trade-offs) are mentioned but not fully interrogated or linked back to the title.
Support and evaluation remain largely descriptive; broader implications and counterclaims are under-explored.
The essay lacks an explicitly stated knowledge question to anchor the inquiry, which weakens analytical focus.
Frequent citation and formatting issues (inconsistent footnotes, uncritical source integration) reduce academic rigor.
Occasional lapses in logical progression and first-person phrasing undermine coherence and formal tone.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: With an overall examiner mark of 5/10, the essay demonstrates a strong grasp of the title and appropriate use of examples, warranting substantive credit for understanding (2 marks) and for support and evaluation (2 marks). However, the uneven depth of analysis, patchy engagement with counterclaims, and formal shortcomings (citations and voice) limit the development and coherence of arguments, justifying a more modest allocation (1 mark) for argument development. These weighted allocations balance the essayâs clear strengths in focus and illustration against its analytical and structural weaknesses, summing precisely to the official total of 5.

annotations.comment: Remove the question mark after the reference URL in the footnote to avoid confusion and ensure accurate sourcing.
The shift to History as a second AOK is clearly marked, maintaining structural coherence.
Good interdisciplinary references (Maus, The Reader); evaluate their reliability and biases more explicitly to deepen analysis.
Introducing new evaluative points in the conclusion dilutes the established analysis; reserve this section for synthesis only.
The conclusion header is appropriately signposted, maintaining the essayâs structural clarity.
Clear heading for Example 1 helps structure the essay and signals a shift to the natural science case study.
The discussion remains largely descriptive; it needs deeper analysis of how computational models may oversimplify biological complexity and introduce epistemic risks.
The citation is presented without critique of its authority or limitations; integrate source evaluation to strengthen the academic rigor.
The evaluation section is well placed; defining clear criteria for comparing AOKs would improve the depth of analysis.
This transitional summary asserts conclusions without sufficient linkage to evidence; ensure each claim is directly supported by earlier analysis.
The claim that finite resources can drive innovation needs explicit connection back to the essayâs title question on reconciling pursuit and availability.
The essay lacks an explicitly stated knowledge question to anchor the discussion. Formulating a clear KQ would sharpen focus and guide subsequent analysis in line with the prescribed title.
Selection of Natural Science and History is appropriate; to strengthen links, briefly justify why these AOKs best illuminate resource constraints.
The introduction does not formulate a specific knowledge question guiding the inquiry. Articulating one would clarify the analytical focus.
Ensure footnote citations include full publication details (e.g., date accessed) to adhere to academic referencing standards.
Insightful identification of equity and access issues highlights real-world implications of resource disparities in science.
The prescribed title is presented clearly, ensuring readers immediately understand the central inquiry and its reference to natural sciences and another AOK.
The introduction effectively situates the discussion by outlining the significance of resource limitations in medicine and historical research.
First-person phrasing (âBy learningâ¦ I was ableâ) disrupts the formal TOK tone. Rewrite in impersonal voice for academic consistency.
Footnote formatting is inconsistent with earlier notes; maintain a uniform style throughout.
Using CADD and Paxlovid as a concrete example lends credibility and demonstrates effective grounding in the natural sciences.
The discussion of historiansâ ethical and strategic choices deepens the exploration of how resources shape inquiry in History.
The generalization header signals an effort to abstract from the example to a broader argument, which is good for coherence.
Several sentences are overly long and combine multiple ideas; consider dividing them to improve clarity and readability.
The header for the generalization of Example 2 appears without supporting text, resulting in an abrupt transition.
While rich in detail, this section lacks explicit linkage back to the reconciliation of knowledge pursuit and finite resources posed by the title.
The conclusion succinctly restates central arguments, providing clear closure to the essayâs discussion.
The conclusion would benefit from explicit discussion of the wider implications for how societies allocate resources to knowledge pursuits.

rubricCriterionStrandBandContents.content:
The essay does not
reach a standard
described by levels
1â5 or is not a
response to one of
the prescribed titles
on the list for the
current session.
The discussion is weakly connected to the title. While there may be links to the areas of knowledge, any relevant points are descriptive or consist only of unsupported assertions.

The discussion is connected to the title and makes superficial or limited links to areas of knowledge. The discussion is largely descriptive. Limited arguments are offered but they are unclear and are not supported by effective examples.

The discussion
is focused on
the title and is
developed with
some links to
areas of
knowledge.
Arguments are
offered and are
supported by
examples.
There is some
awareness of
different points
of view.

The discussion is focused on the title and is linked effectively to areas of knowledge. Arguments are clear, coherent and supported by examples. There is awareness and some evaluation of different points of view.

The discussion has a sustained focus on the title and is linked effectively to areas of knowledge. Arguments are clear, coherent and effectively supported by specific examples. The implications of arguments are considered. There is clear awareness and evaluation of different points of view.
